visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt and a dark tie. He has a serious and concerned expression as he looks down and to his left. The background is a blurry, industrial-looking space with horizontal slats. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio consists solely of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. The music is somber and atmospheric, with a gentle, mournful melody that creates a serious and slightly tense mood, suggesting a moment of discovery or reflection in a dramatic context. The camera cuts to a tight, close-up shot of a hand holding a black wallet. The wallet is partially enclosed in a clear plastic bag. The wallet contains an ID card with a photo of the same man from the previous shot. The ID card is stained with what appears to be blood, particularly on the text and photo. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain in the top left corner. The camera remains steady, emphasizing the details of the bloody ID card. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects present.
